macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Posts Fifth Straight Weekly Loss Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 2% last week, marking its first five consecutive weekly declines since 2022, and is on track for its worst month in a year due to stalled Middle East peace talks and rising oil prices to $112 per barrel.

items.title: PCE Inflation Surges 0.7% in Largest Monthly Gain Since 2022
items.summary: The Fed's preferred PCE inflation measure jumped 0.7% in one month, the biggest increase since June 2022, driven by Middle East conflict fallout, higher energy prices, and supply disruptions.

items.title: Markets Price Out All Fed Rate Cuts for 2026, Expect Hikes Elsewhere
items.summary: Traders now anticipate no Federal Reserve rate cuts throughout 2026, a shift from three cuts expected earlier, with rate hikes priced in for the Bank of England, Bank of Japan, and ECB amid persistent inflation.

items.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady at 3.5-3.75%, Cites Elevated Inflation and Uncertainty
items.summary: The FOMC maintained the federal funds rate target at 3.5-3.75%, noting inflation at 3.5% in March due to tariffs, energy prices, and Middle East disruptions, while the economy remains resilient with 2% GDP growth.

items.title: US 10-Year Treasury Yield Rises to 4.43% as Inflation Fears Mount
items.summary: Government bond yields increased across advanced economies, with the US 10-year Treasury up 7 basis points to 4.43%, reflecting concerns over oil prices testing central banks' ability to combat inflation.

items.title: Key Earnings Ahead: Airbnb, AMD, Disney, McDonald's, Uber
items.summary: Investors await earnings from major firms including Airbnb, AMD, Arm, BMW, Disney, HSBC, McDonald's, Palantir, Shell, and Uber, signaling broader market trends amid strong but broadening earnings.

items.title: Upcoming US Jobs Report Expected to Show 62K Job Gains
items.summary: Consensus forecasts a slowdown to 62,000 jobs added in April versus 178,000 in March, with unemployment steady at 4.3%, providing clues on labor market resilience.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Tests Critical $83.6K Level as Market Gains Hold
items.summary: Bitcoin is testing a critical $83.6K level amid broad market gains, with top performers over the past 24 hours including Dash (+30%), Basic Attention Token (+10.2%), and Zcash (+7.8%). Even laggards like TRUMP showed slight gains (+0.1%).

items.title: Bitcoin Recovers to $80,263 Up 2.1% Amid Stablecoin Liquidity Concerns
items.summary: Bitcoin reclaimed $80,000 twice on May 4 but faces risks from contracting exchange liquidity due to dropping stablecoin reserves, with market cap at $321.1 billion. Analyst warns the move lacks foundation to hold.

items.title: Crypto Shorts Suffer $300M Liquidations as Bitcoin Hits $80,000
items.summary: Over $371 million in cryptocurrency contracts were liquidated in the last 24 hours, with $302 million from short positions as Bitcoin surged past $80,000.

items.title: Stablecoin Legislation Advances with Compromise on Yield Payments
items.summary: The Digital Asset Market Clarity Act nears passage after a compromise barring simple interest on stablecoins but allowing rewards for usage, boosting stocks like Circle (+20%) and Coinbase (+7%) on May 4.

items.title: $200B Erased from US Markets Amid US-Iran Tensions
items.summary: Escalating US-Iran tensions wiped $200B from US markets, impacting crypto sentiment, though Bitcoin prediction markets still price 99.8% chance above $66,000 by May 7.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Gemini Receives Major Update with Significant Capability Improvements
items.summary: Google has released a new Gemini update featuring substantial improvements in reasoning capabilities and AI performance that experts say could transform how users interact with AI systems.

items.title: Codex Introduces New /go Command Described as 'Most Consequential' Feature
items.summary: Codex has added a new /go command that developers are calling the most significant feature shipped to the platform recently, generating viral interest in the developer community.

items.title: METR Researchers Discuss Misinterpretations of Key AI Timeline Measurement
items.summary: Beth Barnes and David Rein from METR address widespread misreadings of their influential log-linear measurement tracking frontier model capabilities, clarifying how the data should be properly interpreted.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: GameStop Reportedly Makes $56 Billion Bid to Acquire eBay
items.summary: GameStop is making a bold $56 billion bid to buy eBay, aiming to position itself as a rival to Amazon in the retail space. The move was discussed in a recent Kinda Funny Games Daily stream.

items.title: Two New GTA 6 Leaks Emerge in Past 24 Hours
items.summary: New leaks for GTA 6 include a Glassdoor interview with a developer and leaked production posters and billboards, suggesting Rockstar is pushing hard for a November 19th release without delays.

items.title: The Division 2 Year 8 PvP Updates Announced
items.summary: After years of player complaints, The Division 2 is receiving major PvP updates including anti-cheat improvements, lag switch detection, and changes to existing Dark Zone and Conflict modes.

items.title: Halo Studios Claimed to Be Developing Halo 2 and Halo 3 Remakes
items.summary: Reports indicate Halo Studios is actively working on remakes of Halo 2 and Halo 3, as highlighted in recent gaming news roundups.

items.title: Capcom Teasing Pragmata Sequel After Success
items.summary: Following strong performance, Capcom is considering a follow-up to Pragmata and provided updates on other projects like Onimusha.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: GameStop Submits $56 Billion Offer to Acquire eBay
items.summary: GameStop has reportedly submitted a $56 billion offer to buy eBay, with the deal potentially coming as soon as this month according to The Wall Street Journal.

items.title: Apple Explores US Chip Production with Intel and Samsung
items.summary: Apple held exploratory talks with Intel and visited a Samsung plant in Texas to discuss producing core chips for its devices domestically.

items.title: Elon Musk Settles Years-Long SEC Dispute Over Twitter Investment for $1.5 Million
items.summary: Elon Musk has agreed to pay $1.5 million to settle with the SEC without admitting wrongdoing in a dispute related to his Twitter investment.

items.title: iOS 26.5 to Introduce End-to-End Encryption for RCS Messages Between Apple and Android
items.summary: Apple's upcoming iOS 26.5 update will add end-to-end encryption for RCS messaging, enhancing privacy in cross-platform conversations.

items.title: Ask.com Shuts Down, Ending the Era of the Internet's Original Search Butler
items.summary: Ask.com, known for its AI-powered butler search feature, has officially shut down.

items.title: Anomali Launches ThreatStream Next-Gen for Faster Threat Intelligence Action
items.summary: Anomali announced ThreatStream Next-Gen, a new intelligence solution designed to help security analysts prioritize threats more efficiently.

items.title: Panthalassa Raises $140 Million Series B for Renewable Ocean Energy Tech
items.summary: Ocean technology company Panthalassa secured $140 million in Series B funding led by Peter Thiel to advance renewable energy solutions at sea.
